
### predicting ret: extra copy of stack  {.smaller}



* predicting ret --- ministack in processor registers
* push on ministack on call; pop on ret
* ministack overflows? discard oldest, mispredict it later
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/retStack-predicting-ret-extra-copy-of-stack.figure.svg)


### 4-entry return address stack  {.smaller}

![](/pipeline/texfig/retStack-4-entry-return-address-stack.figure.svg)
 

* on <code>call</code>: increment index, save return address in that slot
* on <code>ret</code>: read prediction from index, decrement index
